title: Avoid Nested 'switch' Statements and Expressions
description: Nested 'switch' structures are difficult to understand and can lead to confusion. They should be avoided.
recommendation: Structure your code to avoid the need for nested 'switch' statements or expressions, but if you cannot, then consider moving the inner 'switch' to another method.

checks.message: Structure your code to avoid the need for nested 'switch' statements or expressions, but if you cannot, then consider moving the inner 'switch' to another method.
